name: sample_python_prompts
description: Small prompt subset for quick multi-model collection and analysis.

prompts.prompt: Write a Python class that implements an in-memory cache with expiration. Include methods for get, set, and cleanup of expired entries.
Write a Python function that finds all anagram groups in a list of words. Return groups sorted by size (largest first).
Design and implement a simple URL shortener in Python. Include the shortening logic, storage, and a basic HTTP server to handle redirects.
